chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-487 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of main case. 06.10.2025 Mr. Bakhshan Khan Mahar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General along with XEN Nabi Bux Laghari, West Division Khairupr, Niaz Hussain, Focal Person on behalf of Deputy Commissioner Khairpur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The compliance reports have been filed by Deputy Commissioner Khairpur and Executive Engineer, Irrigation West Division Khairpur, same are taken on record. Perusal of petition and the comments filed by respondent, it appears that there is a civil dispute between the private parties and the same cannot be decided without recording evidence, which this court lacks jurisdiction and the same is to be decided by the Civil Court having jurisdiction. Accordingly, this petition appears to be not maintainable and is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
